name: Triboron International AB (publ)
summary: Triboron International AB (publ) operates as a green technology company in Sweden. It offers consumer and professional fuel formulas, two-stroke formula concentrates, and two-stroke injection formulas that are mixed with fuel to reduce friction, as well as enhance the efficiency of the engine and emission control system under the Triboron brand name. The company is based in Kista, Sweden.
